{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of State Hospitals has attempted to secretly place Sexually Violent Predators in communities without prior notification.",
    "Senate Bill 841 mandates that the Director of the Department of State Hospitals publicly report the number of Sexually Violent Predators in each county annually.",
    "Public safety is designated as the highest criteria for any potential placement of a Sexually Violent Predator under Senate Bill 841.",
    "Senate Bill 841 requires the Department of State Hospitals to approve any placements before any vendor can sign leases for placement locations.",
